steps.name: WHEN the user goes to the secure page
THEN the user is not redirected to the login page
Expected URL to be secure page
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('heading', { name: 'Secure Area', exact: true })
AND the user is not presented with logged in message
Expect "not toBeVisible" getByText('You logged into a secure area!')

parameters.name: Expected Message
parameters.value: The logged in message is not visible because the login screen calls /authenticate which post the message to the secure area

labels.name: titlePath
labels.value: > chromium > Login/herokuappLogin.spec.ts > The-internet.herokuapp Login Page Tests
